description: Single employee, Berlin, €30,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, no Kirchensteuer, 2024

source.description: BMF Lohnsteuerrechner 2024 — gross 30,000, SK I, no Kirche. Engine applies Arbeitnehmer-Pauschbetrag (€1,230) and Sonderausgaben-Pauschale (€36). ZVE = 28,734.

notes: ZVE = 30,000 − 1,230 (Arbeitnehmer-Pauschbetrag) − 36 (Sonderausgaben-Pauschale) = 28,734. §32a EStG: engine calculates 4,052. Soli Freigrenze = 18,130 income tax — 4,052 is below.

description: Single employee, Berlin, €65,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, no Kirchensteuer, 2024

source.description: BMF Lohnsteuerrechner 2024 — gross 65,000, SK I, no Kirche. ZVE = 63,734.

notes: ZVE = 63,734. §32a EStG. Soli still zero (income_tax < Soli-Freigrenze ~18,130).

description: Single, €120,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, Bayern, Kirchensteuer 8%, 2024

source.description: BMF Lohnsteuerrechner 2024 — gross 120,000, SK I, Bayern, Kirche 8%. ZVE ≈ 115,595 after Kirchensteuer added to Sonderausgaben.

notes: Bayern Kirchensteuer 8% on income_tax. Soli applies: income_tax 37,914 > Soli-Freigrenze 18,130. Kirchensteuer is added to Sonderausgaben, increasing ZVE slightly.

source.description: BMF Splitting table 2024 — gross 80,000, SK III, 2 children

notes: Splitting (SK III) + Kinderfreibetrag substantially reduces tax vs single. Checking income_tax < 18,000.

description: Single, €200,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, NRW, Kirchensteuer 9%, 2024

source.description: BMF Lohnsteuerrechner 2024 — gross 200,000, SK I, NRW, Kirche 9%. ZVE ≈ 192,179.

notes: NRW Kirchensteuer 9%. Top bracket 42%. ZVE reduced by Kirchensteuer in Sonderausgaben. Wider tolerance for large incomes.

description: Single, €18,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, 2024 — near Grundfreibetrag

source.description: §32a EStG linear zone — Grundfreibetrag 2024 is €11,604. ZVE = 16,734.

notes: ZVE = 18,000 − 1,230 − 36 = 16,734. §32a EStG linear zone. Engine: 927. Soli zero.

description: Single employee, Berlin, €65,000 gross, Steuerklasse I, no Kirchensteuer, 2025
notes: 2025 rules. Slightly different from 2024 due to updated Grundfreibetrag.

description: Social contributions, employed, €65,000 gross, 2024 — employee share
notes: Engine returns flat keys: pension, unemployment, health, care. health includes GKV Zusatzbeitrag avg. care includes childless surcharge.
